body:
The Dems' First 100 Days No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jixkidk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jixkidk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jixkidk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The Dems' First 100 Days](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jixkidk-kujkulhluu-j/)
Well, it's been 100 days now since Nancy Pelosi was sworn in again as Speaker, and Democrats took over the U.S. House of Representatives. So how much have they been able to accomplish?Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jixkidk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jixkidk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Where the Democrats Want to Take Us](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jixkidk-kujkulhluu-d/)
If you can't win fair and square, change the rules, rig things more to your liking. That's what Washington Democrats are trying to do. This week I'm on the blog talking about the Democrats' first bill, H.R. 1, and what exactly is in it.Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jixkidk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jixkidk-kujkulhluu-k/)
## [Exoneration](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jixkidk-kujkulhluu-u/)
We've had a couple of days for it to sink in now. Special Counsel Robert Mueller finally delivered his verdict on alleged collusion between the Trump campaign and the Russians. And Mueller says - no collusion. So, now it's time to put all this behind us, and move on to solving real issues facing our country.Click the link below to read this week's blog post on where I think we go from here. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jixkidk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jixkidk-kujkulhluu-b/)
## [I'd Rather Be Us Than Them](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jixkidk-kujkulhluu-n/)
We Republicans face ongoing challenges when it comes to winning elections in America nowadays. But in my view, our problems pale in comparison to what the Democrats face. They are more and more becoming the party of socialism. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Coward
body:
| | |
---
Peter,
Donald Trump is a coward.
He punches down and demeans the vulnerable. He demonizes women and people of color. He spews hate and division.
He has tried to reduce America to its smallest self by attacking the values and institutions of our democracy and turning our most cherished principles inside out. By rooting for bigotry, discrimination and violence, by closing our doors to immigrants and refugees, and by taking from the many to line the pockets of a few. He puts his name in bold on every building.
He does all of this because he wants us to believe he is powerful. He is not. He is weak.
**We deserve better.** We deserve a president brave enough to stand up for what's right and to take on the challenges that divide us. A president with the humility to admit when they're wrong, who doesn't run from progress but embraces it. We deserve a president who's not afraid of a fundamental truth: We are a better country when we care about one another.
I believe I can bring this country together. I am going to fight for every family in this country as hard as I would fight for my own. And with your help, I can run a campaign strong enough to defeat Donald Trump.
**[To get my message out there, we need to guarantee my spot on the Democratic debate stage. That starts with having 65,000 individual donors to this campaign--can you be one of them? Donate right now to help get me on the debate stage and support my vision for defeating Donald Trump.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976ec4/2ae112ef/6d8d0893/357dc782/3967941695/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMjktZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3029-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

I launched my campaign for president in front of Trump International three weeks ago because that tower is a shrine to greed, division and vanity--and those are the exact problems standing in the way of everything I believe in.
Our democracy has been taken out of the hands of the people and given over to special interests.
If you're not willing to get money out of politics and have publicly funded elections, greedy lobbyists will continue to control our lawmaking. If you're not willing to take on the drug companies, you can't solve the opioid crisis or bring down the cost of prescriptions. If you're not willing to take on the fossil fuel companies, you can't fight the effects of climate change and get to net-zero carbon emissions.
I believe, in my bones, that we can accomplish all this and more. And I know that years from now, we will look back on this moment in our history and be able to say we did something about it.
**If you 're with me, make a donation right now--every gift gets me closer to being on the Democratic debate stage where I can continue to share my brave vision for this country, and every gift goes toward helping me defeat Donald Trump:**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976ec4/2ae112ef/6d8d0893/357dc782/3967941695/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMjktZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3029-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

When people come together to drive out darkness, hope rises. Fear loses. And brave wins.

Thank you.

Kirsten

name: Jim Hood
subject: Why I’m running for governor
body:
|
---

Hi there,

I want to tell you why I'm running for governor of Mississippi.

**I 'm running for governor because it's time to put the interests of working families at the center of what matters in our state. It's not a Democratic or Republican agenda. It's a working families agenda. It's about getting things done to build a better Mississippi for the hardworking people of this state.**

As Attorney General, I've recovered over $3 billion for Mississippi taxpayers from big corporations, scam artists, and polluters. I'm going to take that same prosecutor mentality to state government -- and go after every instance of taxpayers being ripped off. Every special insider deal. Every wasteful giveaway. We need an honest and transparent government and the end of shady backroom deals. That's why I've called for reform of state government.

The legislature approved a massive $210 million per year tax giveaway to big out-of-state corporations -- many of whom are campaign contributors. My priority is working folks. That's why I've called for rolling back the sales tax on food. Let's make it easier to put food on the table for the hardworking people of Mississippi.

We need to build a state that creates jobs so our children can build a bright future here. For Mississippi to grow, we need to be swinging hammers and building things. That begins by fixing our crumbling roads and bridges. And we need to expand workforce development and job training at community colleges and technical schools.

To improve our schools, I will lead the effort to institute statewide pre-K, raise teacher pay, and make college more affordable.

And I will fight to keep our rural hospitals open and expand access to affordable quality health care for our fellow Mississippians.

It comes down to this -- in everything I've done as Attorney General, I've put working families first. That's what I will do as governor. With your support, we can move our state forward and put the hardworking people of Mississippi first.

I'm going to be asking for your help in a variety of ways, but for now, I'm asking you to **follow our campaign on social media to get updates -- and tell your friends**!

**[Like us on Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/i1XXZmZzlQMmCkodW7JeOOzriI8e_g1ppJPMe4CZhbs=/ahHFfY9E2X_SA98SN5F6uGtEFJ5HeiN8GYoGRlJRDFw=)
[Follow us on Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/i1XXZmZzlQMmCkodW7JeOOzriI8e_g1ppJPMe4CZhbs=/RdoUmmhNeS4erjVvI7kFDww1gckNxz8icCGDee6QU-I=)
[Follow us on Instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/i1XXZmZzlQMmCkodW7JeOOzriI8e_g1ppJPMe4CZhbs=/-IZPhuZA_sXSVKEG0GDNeWa-hfGbXvXRgNki5_33I4w=)**

Thanks,
Jim

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Unique from day one
body:
| | Interview with Abby Johnson
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRW3we3u8oKwtxLPg1pS-XOBuaI4vqMGV7Z78Jx19HcLJbPWUE7lhcwSIYtLblhs99sHd90AsDsZtt9FnnZTc6YQvsDbF7rAe44d87VxbA3D&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190412com01&n=1)
| Peter, My Faith Votes sat down with Abby Johnson, who shares her personal transformation story in the pro-life movie [_Unplanned_](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=XIupFEPQjNV-8ep4_PIQckuXrKoBjgKha-I_hNxq_tI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190412com01&n=2), and discusses how science supports life inside the womb and the vital role Christians play in the pro-life battle. _“As science becomes more advanced, we know more about the unborn person in the womb, about what makes them unique and unrepeatable.” - Abby Johnson_ Abby, a former Planned Parenthood Director, experienced a complete perspective change herself after witnessing a 13-week-old fetus struggle for his life during an ultrasound guided abortion procedure. “I realized there was humanity in the womb, and abortion was taking an individual human life,” she said. Read the [My Faith Votes interview](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRW3we3u8oKwtxLPg1pS-XOBuaI4vqMGV7Z78Jx19HcLJbPWUE7lhcwSIYtLblhs99sHd90AsDsZtt9FnnZTc6YQvsDbF7rAe44d87VxbA3D&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190412com01&n=3) with Abby Johnson to learn her inside perspective on what Christians must remember as we stand for life in the public square. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRW3we3u8oKwtxLPg1pS-XOBuaI4vqMGV7Z78Jx19HcLJbPWUE7lhcwSIYtLblhs99sHd90AsDsZtt9FnnZTc6YQvsDbF7rAe44d87VxbA3D&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190412com01&n=4)

clean_body: | | Interview with Abby Johnson | Peter, My Faith Votes sat down with Abby Johnson, who shares her personal transformation story in the pro-life movie , and discusses how science supports life inside the womb and the vital role Christians play in the pro-life battle. “As science becomes more advanced, we know more about the unborn person in the womb, about what makes them unique and unrepeatable.” - Abby Johnson Abby, a former Planned Parenthood Director, experienced a complete perspective change herself after witnessing a 13-week-old fetus struggle for his life during an ultrasound guided abortion procedure. “I realized there was humanity in the womb, and abortion was taking an individual human life,” she said. Read the with Abby Johnson to learn her inside perspective on what Christians must remember as we stand for life in the public square. subject: DNC launches hyper-local effort to shadow Trump & 2PM EST Stakeholder call TODAY
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/3b2bfcc93ed2/dnc-launches-hyper-local-effort-to-shadow-trump-2pm-est-stakeholder-call-today?e=d6c5c7d7ec)

Hi All,

We wanted to make sure you saw this exciting announcement (https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2020-election/dnc-launches-hyper-local-2020-effort-shadow-trump-trail-n993196?cid=mob_npd_nn_ios_mar&utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=283d5109e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_04_11_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-283d5109e6-238537933) today that we are expanding the DNC's War Room. We previewed this hyper-local strategy for the next 19 months with NBC News (story HERE (https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2020-election/dnc-launches-hyper-local-2020-effort-shadow-trump-trail-n993196?cid=mob_npd_nn_ios_mar&utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=283d5109e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_04_11_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-283d5109e6-238537933) ) and we'd love your help getting the word out. You can also
follow @DNCWarRoom (https://twitter.com/DNCWarRoom?utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=283d5109e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_04_11_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-283d5109e6-238537933) on Twitter and like DNC War Room (https://www.facebook.com/DNCWarRoom?utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=283d5109e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_04_11_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-283d5109e6-238537933) on Facebook to get the latest from the War Room right as it comes out.

You are also invited to join a DNC Stakeholder call TODAY @ 2pm EST to learn more!: RSVP for our Stakeholder Briefing Call here (http://myaccount.maestroconference.com/conference/register/E3S50DQEE7DX811?utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=283d5109e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_04_11_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-283d5109e6-238537933)

The DNC War Room is a battleground states-focused research and rapid response unit made up of dozens of research, communications, and mobilization staffers entirely dedicated to getting Trump out of the White House. The DNC’s War Room houses the most experienced Trump team in politics and as we move into the 2020 cycle, the War Room is re-launching with a broader mission and more public role in the party’s fight to defeat Trump, and hold his administration and the Republican Party accountable. For the next eighteen months, the War Room will hold Trump and Republicans accountable across a variety of mediums, relying more heavily on digital content to get the facts out, counter the White House message, and localize the impacts of the Trump administration in a way that has never been done before in a presidential election.

Want an example of what you'll see from the DNC War Room? Check outthis video (https://twitter.com/DNCWarRoom/status/1116285541169995781?utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=283d5109e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_04_11_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-283d5109e6-238537933) — and give us a retweet — from the DNC's War Room exposing how Trump has betrayed the people he promised to help!

What you can do now:
* Please follow @DNCWarRoom (https://twitter.com/DNCWarRoom?utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=283d5109e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_04_11_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-283d5109e6-238537933) on Twitter and like DNC War Room (https://www.facebook.com/DNCWarRoom?utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=283d5109e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_04_11_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-283d5109e6-238537933) on Facebook to get the latest from the War Room right as it comes out.
* [RETWEET THIS (https://twitter.com/DNCWarRoom/status/1116285541169995781?utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=283d5109e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_04_11_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-283d5109e6-238537933) ] For the last two years, Donald Trump has betrayed the people he promised to help. For the next 19 months, we’re going to make it known: We’re sick of it. [video (https://twitter.com/DNCWarRoom/status/1116285541169995781?utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=283d5109e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_04_11_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-283d5109e6-238537933) ]
* [RETWEET THIS (https://twitter.com/DNCWarRoom/status/1116341549846159361?utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=283d5109e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_04_11_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-283d5109e6-238537933) ] We’re going to make sure voters in communities across the country know exactly how Trump has broken the promises he made to them. Watch more here: [video (https://twitter.com/DNCWarRoom/status/1116285541169995781?utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=283d5109e6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_04_11_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-283d5109e6-238537933) ]

subject: Thank you!
body:
Welcome to Team Perdue! David’s outsider message is simple: Washington is broken. If we want different results from Washington, we have to send a different type of person to Washington.

David is working to change Washington from the inside out, but he can’t do this alone. Here are some things you can do right now to help:

**If you aren’t already, follow David on[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/perduesenate/), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/perduesenate/), and [Twitter](https://twitter.com/Perduesenate) to stay updated.**

David’s focus on results doesn’t make him the most popular person in Washington. Unlike career politicians, **David is counting on your support to share his message with as many Georgians as possible.[Please chip in whatever you can afford](https://secure.anedot.com/perdue-for-senate/donate-today?source_code=emailupdates).**

Team Perdue is a movement of people committed to changing the direction of our country. We’re glad to have you onboard, and we’ll be in touch with more ways you can help soon.

Team Perdue

Peter,

Mike and his colleagues in the House have passed an historic, sweeping overhaul of our democracy. The measure takes action on campaign finance, ethics, and voting rights. This is a huge step forward in fighting corruption and fixing Washington.

But Senator Mitch McConnell won't even bring it to a vote in the Senate.

**[We must put grassroots pressure on McConnell and Senate Republicans to take action. Add your name right away to join the call!->](https://act.myngp.com/el/ayQGUCQ2mN24fiKazDj93RC5LDZdgU7-1LuhQe2p77U=/eesafuC9QMJvEL0YUwrsnhjFbwPsGHqDGA5SBuySvlo=)**

[Send a message to McConnell](https://act.myngp.com/el/ayQGUCQ2mN24fiKazDj93RC5LDZdgU7-1LuhQe2p77U=/eesafuC9QMJvEL0YUwrsnhjFbwPsGHqDGA5SBuySvlo=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Fraying Edges of Universal Health Care
body:
"If you’re wondering what Democrats have in mind when they tout 'Medicare For All,' look no further than England." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d6869df72&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Fraying Edges of Universal Health Care**

“If you’re wondering what Democrats have in mind when they tout 'Medicare For All,' look no further than England. There are more reports of the U.K.’s National Health System’s collapse, this time featuring horror stories of rationing care for the elderly,” Tammy Bruce writes in _The Washington Times_.

When health insurance is completely controlled by the government, it “isn’t about who gets health care, it’s about who doesn’t. It is the ultimate in population control.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=464c95d4c4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| The "Medicare for All" bill “seeks utopia by giving government centralized power and control over every aspect of medicine via a single-payer model, and comes with an astronomical price tag. The cost in dollars is in the trillions, but there is also another, hidden cost: the elimination of the conscience rights of nurses and doctors,” Dr. Grazie Pozo Christie writes in _[The Hill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1fb8f8186d&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “How pathetic: A member of Congress can’t acknowledge what happened on one of the most horrific days in US history,” the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a9507a663b&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. On March 23, Rep. Ilhan Omar (D-MN) said the Council on American-Islamic Relations “was founded after 9/11 because they recognized that some people did something, and [Muslims] were starting to lose access to our civil liberties.” The editors don’t mince words: “Some people did something? Wow. What a way to describe the heinous surprise attack on America that claimed 3,000 lives.”
---
|
---
| “What Congresswoman Ilhan Omar said about Sept. 11 was disgraceful,” former Deputy Chief of the New York City Fire Department Jim Riches writes in the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7900eb3293&e=3ee4985eea)_. “She dismissed thousands of people being murdered like it was an everyday occurrence when she said ‘some people did something.’ On 9/11/01 my son, firefighter Jimmy Riches was murdered along with close to 3,000 American citizens by Muslim terrorists.”
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump signed a pair of executive orders aimed at speeding up oil and gas pipeline permitting, including limiting the ability of activists and states to block key energy projects,” Michael Bastasch reports for _[The Daily Caller](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0fe38ee7d9&e=3ee4985eea)_. “President [Barack] Obama lamented the lack of shovel-ready jobs; President Trump is going straight to the operating engineers who will build our infrastructure to show how he will clean out the stables and make America stronger,” said Dan Kish, senior fellow at the Institute for Energy Research.
---
|
---
| “William Barr knew he wasn’t accepting easy duty as Donald Trump’s Attorney General, and it’s no surprise that the Democratic-media complex attacked him in unison on Wednesday. His sin was disclosing that he wants to find out how the FBI came to eavesdrop on the 2016 Trump presidential campaign,” _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=92520bab30&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “All of this should be encouraging to Americans who want credibility restored to an FBI that lost its ethical bearings under James Comey.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c41e206e6e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cde34c1de1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=28b31af9f7)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am writing this note to ask if you would make a $3 donation to our campaign. If you do, today is the day we’re going to reach 1 million individual donations.
body:
What we are doing will change American politics forever
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1022%2E150750%2EFRXWuB)

Sisters, Brothers, and Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign — possibly the 1 millionth donation to our campaign. I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why this request, and that milestone, is so important.
Here is the truth: the economic and political systems of this country are stacked against ordinary Americans. The rich get richer and use their wealth to buy elections. Working families get poorer and feel as if they are powerless to fight back.
But what we are doing on this campaign — in a way that will change American politics forever — is proving that when people of all backgrounds come together and fight for a government that represents all of us, we are more powerful than anyone would have imagined.
That is why reaching 1 million volunteers in our first week was so important. That is why our organizing events on April 27 are so important. And that is why reaching this goal of 1 million individual donations so fast is so important. But I cannot do any of this alone, and that is why I have to ask:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign and help us reach 1 million individual contributions by midnight tonight?](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10549?refcode=em190411-1-120&amount=3&t=28&akid=1022%2E150750%2EFRXWuB)**
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10549?refcode=em190411-1-120&t=29&akid=1022%2E150750%2EFRXWuB)
We are taking on very powerful interests in this campaign: Wall Street, the drug companies and insurance companies, the military and prison industrial complex, and the fossil fuel companies just to name a few.
But if we stand together, people of all backgrounds and from all communities, we are not only going to win this election, we are going to transform this country.
[**Thank you for chipping in and powering our campaign to 1 million donations in record time.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10549?refcode=em190411-1-120&t=30&akid=1022%2E150750%2EFRXWuB)**
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10549?refcode=em190411-1-120&t=31&akid=1022%2E150750%2EFRXWuB)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=32&akid=1022%2E150750%2EFRXWuB). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=33&akid=1022%2E150750%2EFRXWuB). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=34&refcode2=1022_150750_FRXWuB&akid=1022%2E150750%2EFRXWuB).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=35&akid=1022%2E150750%2EFRXWuB).

body:
---
| | Ever since Democrats took back the House, they've made expanding voting rights a MAJOR priority. Now, Republican operatives are looking to state level politics to try and make it harder for Democrats, young people, and people of color to vote. In Arizona -- a swing state that could determine who holds the White House AND the United States Senate -- Republican legislators are pushing a series of bills that would make it harder to vote.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d078b/72412298/44c4b828/61009fc8/3966801705/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV92b3RpbmdyaWdodHMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDQxMV9BWlZvdGluZ1JpZ2h0c19VMV9YMiIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_votingrights?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190411_AZVotingRights_U1_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190411_AZVotingRights_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190411_AZVotingRights_U1_X2") Ever since Democrats took back the House, they've made expanding voting rights a MAJOR priority. **Now, Republican operatives are looking to state level politics to try to make it harder for Democrats, young people, and people of color to vote.** In Arizona -- _a swing state that could determine who holds the White House AND the United States Senate_ \-- Republican legislators are pushing a series of bills that would make it harder to vote. name: Team Beto
subject: $6,000,000 for Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Donald Trump is in Texas for two fundraising events that will bring in $6 million. The president’s campaign already has $19 million in the bank, and now he’s adding stacks of checks from big donors. The Democratic nominee will be up against a president fueled by big money donors and propped up by PACs with unlimited sums to spend.

#
Donald Trump landed in Texas for fundraising events that will bring in _$6 million_. The president’s campaign already has $19 million in the bank, and now he’s adding stacks of checks from big donors. The Democratic nominee will be up against a president fueled by big money donors and propped up by PACs with unlimited sums to spend and unlimited access to call the shots.
**Beto is doing things differently. No PACs, corporations, or lobbyists funding our campaign.** Just people coming together to run a grassroots campaign like this country has never seen before. And that’s why we’re emailing today — we need your help.
[Beto is up against a president with virtually unlimited resources, but if everyone reading these emails gives a little bit, we can defeat anything headed our way. Can you chip in $3 right now to help us fight back?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17377?refcode=ema20190411-27245&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=27245%2E444211%2Eb6Xlny)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17377?refcode=ema20190411-27245&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=27245%2E444211%2Eb6Xlny)**
In the first few weeks of this race, 99% of Beto’s campaign money was raised online. When you see us hiring organizers and hosting our first weekend of canvassing nationwide, that’s because of emails like this one. When you see Beto on the road in Iowa or South Carolina, that’s because people like you gave $5 or $50 at scale.
[Contribute $3 to Beto today to give us the resources we need to reach every voter. Together we’re proving that a campaign funded by emails like this one can compete against anything the president throws our way.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17377?refcode=ema20190411-27245&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=27245%2E444211%2Eb6Xlny)
This will not be easy. We cannot underestimate the chances of an incumbent president fighting with everything he’s got to hold the White House. But we know one thing for sure, the _only_ path to victory is in the hands of millions of people building a campaign _by_ all of us, _for_ all of us.
Let’s show our strength.
\- Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=27245%2E444211%2Eb6Xlny). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

Friends,
Where I come from in Texas, y'all means all. In other parts of the country, it's yous, yinz, or yuns, but however you say it, 70 percent of the American people agree: It's time for Medicare for All.
[**Bernie has introduced his Medicare for All bill in the Senate, and now you can show your support with a limited-edition "Medicare for All" t-shirt. We do that by building the strongest grassroots movement for Medicare for All our country has ever seen with local Our Revolution groups and showing people every single day what we're fighting for.

name: Cory Booker
subject: I can't tell you how much it would mean
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, I spend a lot of time lately just saying thanks. In these early days as a candidate for President of the United States, it's obvious that no one can do it alone. And that's why I'm reaching out. **When I look back, it will be among the biggest moments of my entire life.** And I couldn't be more grateful to all of you. My dad used to say to me: "Boy, don't forget where you came from and the people who sacrificed to get you to where you are." You helped me get where I am today, and I hope to make you proud and to earn and keep your support every step of the way. For me, success isn't defined by how many dollars we can raise, but by how many people raise their hands to be part of it. I'm going to be asking for your help, in all sorts of ways, in the weeks and months to come. Today, the most important way to help kickstart this campaign is by chipping in a donation. [_**Even if it 's just a dollar, a donation today would mean the world to me.**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc7611/5fca0d19/1845c791/291ab811/2761828661/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020?refcode=em_fr_x_CB_onb1-new_new_l1") I can promise you I'll never forget it. Now, buckle up, and let's go make some history together. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc7611/5fca0d19/1845c791/291ab810/2761828661/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020?refcode=em_fr_x_CB_onb1-new_new_contribbutton")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc7611/5fca0d19/1845c791/291ab81f/2761828661/VEsF/ "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc7611/5fca0d19/1845c791/291ab81e/2761828661/VEsC/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc7611/5fca0d19/1845c791/291ab81d/2761828661/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc7611/5fca0d19/1845c791/291ab81c/2761828661/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc7611/5fca0d19/1845c791/291ab81b/2761828661/VEsB/ "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc7611/5fca0d19/1845c791/291ab81f/2761828661/VEsO/ "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

body:

Silver?

We have some thoughts on his tweet -- but before we dive in, we have to
ask: can you rush a donation to
Kamala’s campaign for president? We’ve set a goal of raising $250,000 by
midnight tomorrow and are counting on you to reach it:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

on her side. Like yesterday, in Iowa, when despite a flood warning, nearly
1,000 Iowans came out to hear Kamala’s vision for our country and how we
can take back the White House.

None of what we’ve done so far together would be possible without your
support -- and the hundreds of thousands of Americans who have stepped up
to join our campaign.

But we can't forget: in 2016, nearly every pundit and pollster thought

subject: America stands with Venezuelans. The UN must do the same.
body:
Yesterday, Vice President Mike Pence traveled to New York City to represent President Donald J. Trump and the United States before a Special... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=98d73af397&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 11, 2019
---
| | |
# **America stands with Venezuelans. The UN must do the same.**

**Yesterday,** Vice President Mike Pence traveled to New York City to represent President Donald J. Trump and the United States before a Special Session of the United Nations Security Council on the crisis in Venezuela.

**“For six long years,** the people of Venezuela have suffered under the heavy hand of oppression,” the Vice President told the Security Council. “The United Nations and this Security Council have refused to act.”
** 🎬 ****[Watch: Vice President Pence calls out Maduro’s “Ambassador”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af9889a700&e=3ee4985eea) **
**America’s message was clear:** “This body should revoke the credentials of Venezuela’s representative to the United Nations, recognize Interim President Juan Guaido, and seat the representative of the free Venezuelan government in this body without delay,” Vice President Pence continued.

**Maduro's socialist dictatorship** has turned Venezuela, once one of the wealthiest countries in the Western Hemisphere, into a tragic scene of deprivation. The economy has shrunk by nearly half, leaving 9 out of 10 Venezuelans in poverty. The average citizen there has lost more than 20 pounds from malnutrition, including thousands of children who continue to face starvation.

**In the midst** of this suffering, Maduro has lent no helping hand—just the opposite. When America and its allies sent crucial aid to Venezuela’s people, Maduro’s henchmen blocked and literally burned it, committing violence against any who opposed them. In just 3 months, the regime has thrown more than 1,200 people in jail without due process. At least 40 protesters have been killed.

**“There can be no bystanders** to this history,” Vice President Pence warned. “For the peace and security of our hemisphere, the world and the United Nations must stand with the people of Venezuela.”

**With that, the Vice President** turned to Maduro’s representative before the Security Council. “With all due respect, Mr. Ambassador, you shouldn’t be here. You should return to Venezuela and tell Nicolas Maduro that his time is up. It’s time for him to go.”

[Vice President calls for restoring democracy in Venezuela](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f034d587be&e=3ee4985eea)

**More:** [President Trump says “Socialism is dying” in Venezuela—and America](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a7f2c501da&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump honors WWII veterans**

**Last summer,** when President Trump spoke at the Veterans of Foreign Wars annual convention, he welcomed World War II veteran Allen Jones to join him onstage. “Mr. President, I want to ask you something,” Sergeant Jones said.

**“I’m going to be 95** years of age April 11th of next year. Hopefully, that you will allow me to bring my family into the Oval Office to meet you.” President Trump readily agreed, telling Sergeant Jones he was welcome anytime.

**Today, Sergeant Jones** got his wish, spending his 95th birthday at the White House with his family. President Trump welcomed three more World War II veterans and their families along with him—each with their own unique story of service and sacrifice.
* **Sidney Walton** , a former Army veteran, has been traveling the country on a “No Regrets Tour,” reminding Americans of the sacrifice WWII veterans made to save this country.

* **Floyd Wigfield** didn’t hesitate to serve after the attack on Pearl Harbor in 1941, enlisting in the U.S. Army. On June 6, 1944, he and his fellow soldiers of Company G landed on Utah Beach in what became known as “D-Day.”

* **Paul Kriner** joined the Army at age 24 and fought Axis forces in Italy. Years later, when our Nation was plunged into another war—this time in Korea—he didn’t hesitate to serve again. At 103 years old, Kriner still proudly tells his story.

[Watch: President Trump grants WW2 veteran’s birthday wish!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ddca2ee4b9&e=3ee4985eea)

|
